title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day
summary: Per the official synopsis: It’s a Brand New Day for Peter Parker. Holland is reprising his role as Peter Parker/Spider-Man, along with Zendaya as MJ and Jacob Batalon as Peter’s former bestie Ned Leeds.
caption: output/2026-07-21/sony-releases-one-last-trailer-for-spider-man-brand-new-day.txt
